mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_data_daily_all ( stock_code, trade_date, open, highest, lowest, close, close_foread, close_backad, amount, close_previous, volume ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.highest}, #{item.lowest}, #{item.close}, #{item.closeForead}, #{item.closeBackad}, #{item.amount}, #{item.closePrevious}, #{item.volume} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open = VALUES(open), highest = VALUES(highest), lowest = VALUES(lowest), close = VALUES(close), close_foread = VALUES(close_foread), close_backad = VALUES(close_backad), amount = VALUES(amount), close_previous = VALUES(close_previous), volume = VALUES(volume)
mapper.select: select * from stock_data_daily_all where stock_code=#{stockCode} and trade_date<=#{holdingDate} order by trade_date desc limit 1;
